consolidated_learnings.learning: Three-layer persona architecture: Personas → Pre-Flight → Prompts/Principles creates self-reinforcing cognitive bootstrap. All 8 personas enhanced with embedded principles, pre-flight protocols for context loading, and cross-references. 37 principles migrated to YAML for machine-readability.

Principle migration from markdown to YAML enables automation, validation, versioning, and programmatic loading via n5_load_context.py. Structured schema includes principle_id, name, category, version, description, anti_patterns, and examples.

Terminology cleanup: 'mode system' (activate Builder mode) → 'persona system' (switch to Vibe Builder). 'Mode' implies temporary state change; 'persona' implies domain expertise and responsibility. Updated 6 protocol files, replaced 17 instances.

Worker orchestrator pattern: Coordinator spawns specialist workers, tracks via SESSION_STATE parent-child relationships. Components include session_state_manager.py (state tracking), cross_workspace_validator.py (safe artifact transfer), orchestrator_title_generator.py (contextual naming), and orchestrator_rubric_generator.py (worker evaluation).

Cross-workspace safety: Validate before moving artifacts between ephemeral conversation workspaces and persistent N5 directories. cross_workspace_validator.py prevents corruption by checking path resolution, file existence, and blast radius before operations.

SESSION_STATE.md as SSOT for conversations. Fields: conversation_id, type, parent_conversation_id, focus, objective, artifacts_created. Centralized state prevents orphaned conversations and loose threads.

Arrest mechanism for runaway costs: ARREST_SYSTEM.json flag, cost_sentinel.py for velocity monitoring, n5_schedule_wrapper.py arrest check. Thresholds: >60 executions/hour (global), >12 executions/hour (single task), >80% failure rate (failure storm). Always include safety brakes in automation.

Hybrid JSONL + markdown pattern for complex data. JSONL for structured metadata (title, tags, status), links field to markdown files for rich content. Content classification: Atomic (JSONL-only), Reference (JSONL+markdown), External (URLs). Balances structured query with rich content.

Lists validation with orphan detection: n5_lists_validate.py checks schema validation, link path resolution, orphan detection (linked file has no JSONL entry), and duplicate detection. Validation prevents data rot in hybrid systems.

Personal/Knowledge/ vs Knowledge/ distinction. Personal/Knowledge/ is SSOT for human-facing knowledge (Canon, Frameworks, ContentLibrary, CRM, MarketIntelligence, Architecture, Wisdom). Knowledge/ is deprecated compatibility shell pointing to Personal/Knowledge. SSOT prevents duplication and confusion.

Knowledge → N5 flow: N5 reads from Personal/Knowledge/ for context, writes digests/logs/DBs to system areas, only promotes curated insights back to Personal/Knowledge/. N5 as system lens, not primary storage.

Tool-first enrichment principle: Use existing tools (Aviato SDK, use_app_gmail) before building new integrations. Division of labor: Scripts for API calls/file operations/queue processing, LLM for Gmail thread analysis/intelligence formatting, semantic validation for profile quality (not automated tests). Tools=mechanics, LLM=semantics.

CRM unification with multiple data sources: Merge 3 legacy systems (stakeholders/*.yaml, Personal/Knowledge/CRM/, crm_legacy.db) into unified database. Phased migration: --dry-run preview, idempotent scripts, Git snapshots, validation after each phase. Phased migration with rollback prevents data loss.

LLM-over-regex principle for semantic tasks. Regex for structured data (JSON, CSV, file paths, URLs, IDs). LLM for semantic tasks (extract meaning, classify content, parse unstructured data, natural language pattern matching). Anti-pattern: Hardcoded regex for YC founder detection fails on variations. Use LLMExtractor with semantic prompts.

Script-as-Zo-agent pattern for complex workflows. Python script (transcript_processor.py) orchestrates Zo agent phases: detect transcripts → Zo analyzes/selects blocks → Python queues to DB → Zo generates blocks → Python finalizes/notifies. Two databases: meeting_pipeline.db (lifecycle), block_registry.db (queue). Leverages both Python and Zo strengths.

Tiered event discovery: Tier 1 (allowlist, high precision) + Tier 2 (smart detector, high recall). Tier 1: Gmail from:(allowlist) newer_than:2d → extract URLs → score → recommend. Tier 2: Gmail ("lu.ma" OR "partiful") newer_than:2d -from:(allowlist) → flag for review → auto-add to allowlist if same sender 2+ times. Balances precision and recall.

Forward-based allowlist management. User: Forward invite to va@zo.computer with subject 'n5:allowlist'. System (hourly agent): Scan Gmail for subject:"n5:allowlist" newer_than:2h → extract original sender → update event_sources.json → archive email. Manual curation + automated discovery reduces noise.

Semantic duplicate detection: Use embedding similarity (text-embedding-3-large) to identify near-duplicate content. For each resource, find top-5 similar with similarity >0.85 → cluster → rank by date → mark canonical (newest) and stale. Semantic similarity finds duplicates keyword search misses.

Staleness signals (multi-factor): Newer doc with same topic (high), references removed system (high), no modifications 60+ days (medium), low semantic uniqueness (medium). Output STALE_DOCS_REPORT.md with confidence levels. Staleness requires multiple signals, not just timestamps.

Consolidation opportunities: Find semantically related but fragmented content. Example: 'CRM System' topic spread across 6 files (800+400+1200 words). Recommendation: Merge into single N5/docs/crm_system_guide.md. Estimated reduction: 6 files → 1 file. Semantic clustering reveals consolidation opportunities.

Unified media/document tracking. Single system for external media + internal documents. Architecture: N5/data/media_documents.db with media (videos, images, audio), documents (PDFs, DOCX, slides), integrations (YouTube, Drive, Slack). Taxonomy: Type (video, image, audio, document, presentation), Source (local, YouTube, Drive, Slack, email), Status (unprocessed, tagged, archived). Prevents media fragmentation across systems.

Hybrid markdown view with content extraction. When JSONL entry has links field with type:'file', read linked markdown, parse YAML frontmatter, extract content sections (ingredients, instructions, metadata), embed in markdown view. Fallback gracefully for broken links. n5_lists_content_extractor.py module with read_linked_markdown(), parse_frontmatter(), extract_content_sections(), get_truncated_preview().

Markdown view enhancement integration. Modified n5_docgen.py render_list_md() function to detect hybrid entries, call content extractor, embed extracted content, handle errors gracefully. Enhanced view structure: JSONL metadata (title, tags, notes) → Linked Content section (if hybrid) → separator. Content extraction for recipes-like vs generic markdown.
